title: Mexico opens WC with win after record 3 red cards
summary: Mexico defeated South Africa 2-0 in the opening match of the 2026 World Cup at Estadio Azteca in Mexico City. The match was notable for three red card incidents, the most in a World Cup opener, highlighting disciplinary drama in the tournament's inaugural game.
content: Co-hosts Mexico got off to a victorious start, beating South Africa 2-0 as the largest World Cup in history kicked off Thursday at Mexico City's famed Estadio Azteca.

zh.title: 墨西哥在创纪录3张红牌后以胜利开幕
zh.summary: 墨西哥在墨西哥城的阿兹特克体育场以2-0击败南非，赢得2026年世界杯首场比赛。这场比赛因三张红牌事件而引人瞩目，这是世界杯揭幕战中最多的，凸显了锦标赛开幕式的纪律戏剧。

title: Barred WC referee Artan to officiate Super Cup fin...
summary: Somali referee Omar Artan, barred from the World Cup due to US visa issues, has been appointed by UEFA to officiate the UEFA Super Cup final between Paris Saint-Germain and Aston Villa on August 12. The appointment offers a high-profile assignment despite his tournament exclusion.
content: Somali referee Omar Artan, the World Cup match official refused entry to the United States due to visa issues, has been appointed by UEFA to take charge of the UEFA Super Cup final between Paris Saint-Germain and Aston Villa on Aug. 12.

zh.title: 被禁赛的世界杯裁判阿尔坦将主裁超级杯决赛
zh.summary: 因美国签证问题被禁赛的索马里裁判奥马尔·阿尔坦被欧足联任命为8月12日巴黎圣日耳曼与阿斯顿维拉之间的欧足联超级杯决赛的主裁。尽管被排除在锦标赛之外，这个任命为他提供了一个备受关注的任务。

title: Poch: 'Too late' for motivational speeches for U.S...
summary: US Men's National Team coach Mauricio Pochettino stated his squad has moved beyond emotional speeches and is mentally prepared for Friday's World Cup opener against Paraguay. His comments reflect the team's confidence ahead of their tournament campaign.
content: USMNT coach Mauricio Pochettino said that the time for fiery speeches is over and that his side is ready for Friday's World Cup opener against Paraguay.

zh.title: 波切蒂诺："对美国男足队来说，鸡汤演讲已经太晚了"
zh.summary: 美国男足主教练毛里西奥·波切蒂诺表示，他的球队已经超越了情感性的演讲，在心理上为周五对阵巴拉圭的世界杯首场比赛做好了准备。他的评论反映了球队对锦标赛的信心。

title: Real Madrid name Mourinho coach for 2nd time
summary: Real Madrid officially announced José Mourinho as head coach for a second spell with the club, following the departure of Álvaro Arbeloa. This marks Mourinho's return to the Spanish giants after his previous tenure.
content: Real Madrid have confirmed the appointment of José Mourinho for a second spell as the club's coach after ratifying the departure of Álvaro Arbeloa.

zh.title: 皇马第二次任命穆里尼奥为主教练
zh.summary: 皇马官方宣布何塞·穆里尼奥担任球队主教练，这是他第二次执教这家西班牙豪门。在阿尔瓦罗·阿贝罗亚离任后，这标志着穆里尼奥在之前执教期间后重返皇马。

title: Liverpool's Endo out of WC, retires from Japan
summary: Japan captain Wataru Endo has withdrawn from the 2026 World Cup squad due to injury and announced his retirement from international football. The Liverpool midfielder's decision marks the end of his international career.
content: Japan captain Wataru Endo has withdrawn from the squad for the 2026 World Cup due to injury and subsequently announced his retirement from international football.

zh.title: 利物浦恩多退出世界杯，从日本国家队退役
zh.summary: 日本队长远藤航因伤退出2026年世界杯大名单，并宣布从国际足坛退役。这位利物浦中场球员的决定标志着他国际职业生涯的终结。

title: Tottenham's Senesi called up to Argentina squad
summary: Defender Marcos Senesi has been called up to Argentina's 26-player World Cup roster to replace the injured Leonardo Balerdi. The Tottenham player fills a crucial defensive position for the team.
content: The Argentina national team confirmed defender Marcos Senesi will replace the injured Leonardo Balerdi on the 26-player World Cup roster.

zh.title: 托特纳姆热刺后卫塞内西入选阿根廷世界杯大名单
zh.summary: 后卫马科斯·塞内西被召入阿根廷26人世界杯名单，替代受伤的莱昂纳多·巴莱尔迪。这位托特纳姆热刺球员填补了球队防线的关键位置。

title: Sources: Man Utd to pull out of race for Anderson
summary: Manchester United is withdrawing from the transfer race to sign midfielder Elliot Anderson, according to ESPN sources. The decision ends speculation about the player's future with the Premier League club.
content: Manchester United are ready to pull out of the race to sign Elliot Anderson, sources have told ESPN.

zh.title: 消息人士：曼联将退出与安德森的争夺战
zh.summary: 据ESPN消息人士报道，曼彻斯特联队正在退出争夺中场球员埃利奥特·安德森的转会竞争。这一决定结束了关于这名球员与英超俱乐部未来的猜测。

title: Barcelona sign teenage Egypt World Cup striker
summary: Barcelona has completed the signing of Egyptian striker Hamza Abdelkarim from Al Ahly for an initial fee of €1.5 million. The teenage World Cup participant joins the Spanish club in what appears to be a development-focused acquisition.
content: Barcelona have completed the signing of Egypt international Hamza Abdelkarim from Al Ahly for an initial fee of €1.5 million ($1.7m).

zh.title: 巴塞罗那签下埃及少年世界杯前锋
zh.summary: 巴塞罗那以150万欧元的初始费用从艾哈利完成了埃及前锋哈姆扎·阿卜杜勒卡里姆的转会。这位参加过世界杯的少年加盟了这家西班牙俱乐部，看起来这是一笔以发展为导向的收购。

title: 2026 World Cup recap: Mexico kicks off World Cup w...
summary: Mexico opened the 2026 World Cup with a 2-0 victory over South Africa at home in Mexico City. The result marks a strong start for the co-hosts in the tournament.
content: Mexico defeated South Africa 2-0 in Mexico City in the opening match of the tournament.

zh.title: 2026世界杯回顾：墨西哥以2-0击败南非开启世界杯征程
zh.summary: 墨西哥在墨西哥城主场以2-0战胜南非，开启了2026年世界杯的征程。这一结果标志着东道主墨西哥在本届赛事中有了强劲的开局。

title: From near death to World Cup hero - Jimenez's tears for Mexico
summary: Raul Jimenez scored for Mexico at the World Cup, completing a remarkable comeback from a near-fatal injury suffered earlier in his career. His goal and emotional celebration represent a significant personal achievement.
content: From nearly dying on the pitch to scoring for Mexico at the World Cup - Raul Jimenez has completed a remarkable comeback.

zh.title: 从死亡边缘到世界杯英雄 - 希门尼斯为墨西哥流泪
zh.summary: 劳尔·希门尼斯在世界杯上为墨西哥进球，完成了从职业生涯早期遭受的近致命伤害中的非凡复出。他的进球和充满情感的庆祝代表了一个重要的个人成就。
